chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 121 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.7272/2025 (C/A) 17.12.2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Advocate for Respondents/Contemnors Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Representative of Town Committee, Kot Diji is present places on record photocopies of post-dated cheques bearing Nos. 55961966, 55961967 and 55961968 dated 05.01.2026, 05.02.2026 and 05.03.2026 for total amount of Rs.336,277/- of Sindh Bank Khairpur Branch, in favour of the petitioner issued by Chairman and Town Officer, Town Committee Kot diji and submits that entire dues have been paid to the petitioner. On such statement, counsel for the petitioner being satisfied, does not press the listed application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
